content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî after iter-048

## CRITICAL (iter-049 must-fix, both lean-auditor must-fixes, VERIFIED via `lake build`)
1. **Delete the colliding terminal stub to restore the build.** `TensorObjInverse.lean` is **RED**:
   the leftover iter-046 `private lemma conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv` (L216, body `sorry`)
   now shares its FQ name with the proved PUBLIC root decl ‚áí
   `error: a non-private declaration ‚Ä¶ has already been declared`. **Action:** delete L207‚Äì259
   (the docstring + private lemma + sorry body + the stale "IRREDUCIBLE" comment block ‚Äî that comment
   is lean-auditor must-fix #2, now provably false). This is a ~50-line deletion, no new proof.
   Restores terminal to **7 sorries, green-mod-sorry**. Assign a `TensorObjInverse.lean` prover (or a
   refactor micro-pass) for this FIRST.

## HIGH ‚Äî the keystone is now available; close B2 + B1-crux this iter
2. **Close B2 (`restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat`) and the B1-crux
   (`H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict`)** by consuming the public root
   `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv`. Both reduce to it via the
   conjugate-distribution recipe in `analogies/b2mate045.md`
   (`conjugateEquiv_comp`/`mateEquiv_hcomp`/`leftAdjointUniq_trans`). This is the long-blocked pair ‚Äî
   landing both takes terminal 7‚Üí5. Do this in the SAME prover lane as the stub deletion (one file).

## MEDIUM
3. **Blueprint `\uses` completion (planner).** `lem:conjugate_equiv_restrictfunctorcomp_inv` currently
   `\uses{def:restrictcompreindex}` only. The proof load-bears on Mathlib `Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso`
   and `Adjunction.conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv` ‚Äî add Mathlib dependency anchors (\mathlibok)
   for these two and wire them into the block's `\uses`. (Flagged by lvb substrate048; `% NOTE:` added
   this review.)
4. **Stale root-header comment (lean-auditor major).** `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` L46‚Äì47 still claims
   `lhs_tmul` is "the sole in-file sorry" ‚Äî false (root is sorry-free). Next root-touching prover should
   refresh it. Other lean-auditor majors are stale `.lean` comments in the same class ‚Äî see
   `.archon/task_results/lean-auditor-iter048.md`.

## Reusable proof pattern (recorded in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- **Restrict-side conjugate-of-composition via abstract `leftAdjointCompIso` instantiation.** To prove
  `conjugateEquiv ‚Ä¶ (restrictFunctorComp f g).hom = (pushforwardComp f g).hom`: NEVER `ext` the
  conjugate-headed goal (whnf-bombs the pushforward carrier diamond). Instead `rw [show
  (restrictFunctorComp f g).hom = (leftAdjointCompIso ‚Ä¶ pushforwardComp).inv from ?_]`, close the head
  by `conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv`, then discharge the residual concrete iso-hom equality
  sectionwise with `erw` (every SheafOfModules `‚â´`/`.app` seam) merged at MAP level
  (`‚Üê presheaf.map_comp`) + thin-poset `Subsingleton.elim`. The iter-046 "irreducible" verdict was a
  tactic-ordering artifact, not a real obstruction.

## Name-collision gotcha (recorded in PROJECT_STATUS)
- A `private` decl whose FULL qualified name equals a non-private imported decl does NOT get mangled
  away ‚Äî Lean errors and the file goes RED. When promoting a scaffolded gap-fill to a public root decl,
  delete the terminal `private` stub of the same name in the same/next iter.

## Do NOT
- Do NOT re-dispatch a prover at `conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv` ‚Äî it is CLOSED (root, public,
  axiom-clean). The remaining work is consuming it, not re-proving it.
- Do NOT re-attempt the pure-sectionwise `ext`-first chase on any restrict-side conjugate-of-composition
  goal ‚Äî it whnf-bombs. Use the abstract `leftAdjointCompIso` head-route.

## Coverage debt (planner ‚Äî blueprint correspondence)
- `dag-query unmatched` = 106 lean_aux nodes (the new private `restrictFunctor_map_app'` joins the
  long-standing categorical-plumbing debt). Deferred to a scheduled cleanup phase; not on the critical
  path. gaps=0 (no ‚àû holes). blueprint-doctor clean.
